examples: If I die, bury me under the juniper-tree.
Huck said: "Do they always bury it as deep as this?"
"Good," thought Huck, "they will bury it in the old quarry."
She was taken to West Suffolk Hospital in Bury St Edmunds but later died.
Medieval bureaucracy, with its constant duplicating, petitioning and delaying, sometimes threatens to bury the reader.
